creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
teTeX-base 3.0_25 doesn't build on my system:

In file included from pdftoepdf.cc:46:
In file included from ./epdf.h:41:
In file included from ../../web2c/config.h:36:
In file included from /usr/local/include/kpathsea/c-vararg.h:43:
/usr/include/varargs.h:34:2: error: "<varargs.h> is obsolete with this version of GCC."
#error "<varargs.h> is obsolete with this version of GCC."
 ^
/usr/include/varargs.h:35:2: error: "Change your code to use <stdarg.h> instead."
#error "Change your code to use <stdarg.h> instead."
 ^
writeimg.c:138:1: warning: control may reach end of non-void function [-Wreturn-type]
}
^
In file included from pdftoepdf.cc:46:
In file included from ./epdf.h:41:
./../web2c/config.h:111:18: error: expected ';' after top level declarator
extern void uexit P1H(int status);
                 ^
                 ;

extern void usage P1H(const_string progname);
                 ^
                 ;
./../web2c/config.h:115:22: error: expected ';' after top level declarator
extern void usagehelp P2H(const_string *message, const_string bug_email);
                     ^
                     ;
pdftoepdf.cc:409:26: warning: conversion from string literal to 'char *' is deprecated [-Wdeprecated-writable-strings]
    fontdict->dictLookup("Subtype", &subtype);
                         ^
pdftoepdf.cc:420:26: warning: conversion from string literal to 'char *' is deprecated [-Wdeprecated-writable-strings]
    fontdict->dictLookup("BaseFont", &basefont);
                         ^
pdftoepdf.cc:426:32: warning: conversion from string literal to 'char *' is deprecated [-Wdeprecated-writable-strings]
        fontdict->dictLookupNF("FontDescriptor", &fontdescRef) && 
                               ^
pdftoepdf.cc:429:34: warning: conversion from string literal to 'char *' is deprecated [-Wdeprecated-writable-strings]
        if (fontdesc->dictLookup("CharSet", &charset) && 
                                 ^
